title: Culture war clashes in Congress risk stalling must-pass bills
shortDescription: America's elected leaders are again on track to mess up even on the most basic of functions they're required to do: fund government and U.S. defense.

title: Biden has revved up efforts to get Black voters to support him again
shortDescription: Biden needs enthusiastic Black support to win again. So far his message hasn't lit a fire, but his team is trying, while Trump pushes the other way.

title: Trump courts Black voters in Detroit
shortDescription: Presidential hopeful Donald Trump is trying win more support among Black voters, even as polls show most still aren't fans.

title: Janet Yellen slams Donald Trump's idea to raise tariffs, cut income tax
shortDescription: “The impact would be to make life unaffordable for working class Americans, and it would harm American businesses.”

title: Democratic lawmaker says he won't attend Netanyahu's speech to Congress
shortDescription: The vocal Biden surrogate joins a growing group of progressive lawmakers who plan to sit out Netanyahu's visit.

title: Joe Biden rips Supreme Court at Hollywood fundraiser with Barack Obama
shortDescription: Joe Biden said the winner of the election will likely have two Supreme Court appointments and took a shot at Justice Alito's flag controversy.

title: Poll results from Black voters: Biden: meh; Trump: definitely not
shortDescription: Even among 'double-haters' Biden is likely to gain more support than Trump, new USA TODAY poll shows.

title: Takeaways from new poll: Third parties make inroads among Black voters
shortDescription: USA TODAY/Suffolk polls of Michigan and Pennsylvania on why Biden has lost some Black votes. Could Trump's strategy to win them over backfire?

title: Hunter Biden's drug-fueled trial showed 'no one's immune'
shortDescription: The historic trial took place blocks from downtown Wilmington, Delaware, which has been hard hit by the opioid crisis.

title: Donald Trump's best arguments on appeal, and their chances
shortDescription: Legal experts say former President Donald Trump has several potential arguments on appeal in his New York hush money felony conviction.

title: Biden raises $28M at Hollywood fundraiser featuring Obama, Clooney
shortDescription: Biden's reelection campaign will raise at least $28 million at a star-studded fundraiser with Barack Obama, George Clooney and Julia Roberts.

title: Fauci said Trump dropped F-bombs at him in phone call during pandemic
shortDescription: Dr. Anthony Fauci wrote in his upcoming memoir that former President Donald Trump went into an expletive-filled rant with him in a phone call.

title: Biden-Trump debate: CNN announces rules including muted mics
shortDescription: CNN announced additional rules for the June 27 debate between Joe Biden and Donald Trump.

title: Biden's pledge with G7 leaders clouded by Trump's possible return
shortDescription: President Biden has told foreign allies "America is back." But what will it mean if this week's G7 meeting in Italy was his last?

title: Glenn Youngkin remains on Trump's VP radar but faces MAGA skeptics
shortDescription: Trump and the Virginia governor are both businessmen-turned-politicians who have been keeping each other at arm's length – at least until recently.

title: Donald Trump turns 78 in relative quiet, a day after a noisy D.C. trip
shortDescription: The former president stayed low-key a day after he insulted the city of Milwaukee and further teased his vice presidential pick.

title: NY's upcoming primary election highlights rift in Democratic party
shortDescription: Progressive Rep. Jamaal Bowman faces tough race against AIPAC-backed Democratic challenger George Latimer

title: House passes defense policy bill to provide over $895 billion funding
shortDescription: The National Defense Authorization Act passed without objection on a 217-199 vote in the House to authorize more than $895 billion in funding.

title: DOJ refuses to charge AG Garland after House contempt vote
shortDescription: The Justice Department refused to charge Attorney General Merrick Garland after the House voted to hold him in contempt.

title: Awkward: Supreme Court decisions on guns, abortion put Trump in a bind
shortDescription: 'We're knocking out bump stocks,' Trump bragged as president. This week, the Supreme Court that he remade erased that change. A look at some awkward moments.

title: Mayor slams back after Trump calls Milwaukee a 'horrible' city
shortDescription: Milwaukee Mayor Cavalier Johnson has fiercely defended his city after former President Donald Trump criticized it as a “horrible city.”

title: First Lady Jill Biden stops in Minnesota on senior campaign blitz
shortDescription: First Lady Jill Biden visits Duluth, Minnesota during a campaign blitz launching "Seniors for Biden-Harris."

title: Trump's birthday puts Biden age jokes into the spotlight
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump celebrates his 78th birthday but still likes to poke fun at Biden's age.

title: Biden was giving thumbs up to skydivers, not wandering in viral G7 video
shortDescription: Footage shows President Joe Biden give a thumbs up as he motioned over to a group of skydivers.

title: White House slams Biden G7 scrutiny
shortDescription: The White House denied claims that President Joe Biden wandered away from a G7 event.

title: Supreme Court strikes down bump stock ban
shortDescription: The Supreme Court struck down a Trump-era ban on bump stocks, a gun accessory that allows semi-automatic weapons to fire rapidly like machine guns.
